chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 938 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.26 & 27. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4180/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.4181/2024. 14.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Latif Shar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Arain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent, same is taken on record. The case of the applicant was that the impugned order is devoid of any independent reasoning and / or deliberation and the same was not merited befitting the last fact finding forum in the statutory hierarchy. It was contended that the entire impugned order comprises of reproduction leading to dissonant conclusion. Notice was issued and learned counsel for the department is present. It is jointly stated that it would be in the interest of justice and in the interest of all parties that the impugned order be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh. Order accordingly. SCRA stands disposed of. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
